title: Untitled Duck Add-on
description: Add-on mod to tweak "Untitled Duck Mod"
body:
# Untitled Duck Add-on

A Fabric add-on for Untitled Duck Mod that provides quality of life tweaks for duck and goose behavior in Minecraft 1.21.1.

## Features

### 🦆 **Duck Tweaks**
- **Fish Feeding Prevention**: Prevents players from feeding fish to ducks
- **Fish → Kelp Replacement**: When ducks dive and "catch" fish, they hold kelp instead

### 🪿 **Goose Tweaks**
- **Weapon Pickup Prevention**: Prevents geese from picking up weapons (swords, axes, tridents, etc.)
- **Meat/Fish Pickup Prevention**: Prevents geese from picking up meat and fish items
- **Complete Item Blocking**: Option to prevent geese from picking up any items at all
